'''Snevu''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] where the [[Battle of Snevu]] was fought between the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] and the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]].

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''
